zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Knightley I於1291年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾麗莉時，他的父親William de Knightley22歲，母親Dorothy Glover21歲。他和Sybil至少有4個兒子。他去世於1362年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Knightley I于1291年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾麗莉时，他的父亲William de Knightley22岁，母亲Dorothy Glover21岁。他和Sybil至少有4个儿子。他去世于1362年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Knightley I was born in 1291, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Knightley, was 22 and his mother, Dorothy Glover, was 21. He had at least 4 sons with Sybil. He died in 1362, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Knightley I est né en 1291, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Knightley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Glover, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Sybil. Il est décédé en 1362, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Knightley I 1291 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Knightley 22 und seine Mutter Dorothy Glover 21. Er hatte mit Sybil mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1362 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Knightley I è nato il nel 1291 nel Knightley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William de Knightley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Glover, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli con Sybil. Morì nel 1362, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Knightley Iが1291年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーで生まれた時，父William de Knightleyは22歳，母Dorothy Gloverは21歳であった。彼はSybilとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼は1362年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Knightley I(이)가 1291년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Knightley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Glover(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Sybil(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Knightley I nasceu em 1291, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Knightley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Glover, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Sybil. Ele faleceu em 1362, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Knightley I родился в 1291 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Knightley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Glover, 21. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына от Sybil. Он умер в 1362 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Knightley I nació en 1291, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Knightley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Dorothy Glover, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Sybil. Murió en 1362, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
